<!-- ========== FAVICON & APP ICONS ==========
Place these lines inside the <head> tag of your index-v2.html
Paste them RIGHT AFTER the <meta name="robots"...> line
================================================= -->

<!-- Standard Favicon (Browser Tab) -->
<link rel="icon" type="image/png" sizes="32x32" href="data:image/png;base64,">
<link rel="icon" type="image/png" sizes="16x16" href="data:image/png;base64,">

<!-- Apple Touch Icon (iPhone/iPad home screen) -->
<link rel="apple-touch-icon" sizes="180x180" href="data:image/png;base64,">

<!-- Android / PWA icon -->
<link rel="icon" type="image/png" sizes="192x192" href="data:image/png;base64,">

<!-- Fallback shortcut icon -->
<link rel="shortcut icon" href="data:image/png;base64,">

<!-- Browser tab color on mobile -->
<meta name="theme-color" content="#0A2140">
<meta name="msapplication-TileColor" content="#0A2140">
